acceptance_targets: [chapter_05_F03] After revision, the cited passages contain at least three beats rewritten without the current comparison/gaze formulas, and no single prose construction of this type appears more than twice across the chapter.

findings.acceptance_test: After revision, the cited passages contain at least three beats rewritten without the current comparison/gaze formulas, and no single prose construction of this type appears more than twice across the chapter.
findings.evidence: The chapter reuses the same comparison and gaze machinery at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:19, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:77, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:127, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:163, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:237, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:333, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:421, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:447, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:479, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:491.
findings.problem: This draft leans too often on recurring formulas, especially "as if" comparisons and "looked at her" observation beats. After the second or third reuse, the prose starts defaulting to familiar connective tissue instead of finding a new physical or perceptual angle, which flattens a chapter that is otherwise sharp and embodied.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the cited spans in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:19-19, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:77-77, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:127-127, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:163-163, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:237-237, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:333-333, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:421-421, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:447-447, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:479-479, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:491-491 by replacing several repeated comparison/gaze constructions with direct sensory detail, action, or free-indirect perception.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into queer secrecy, erotic specificity, dust-sick bodies, economic shame, bad bargains, and the humiliations of dependence. When deciding between a tidier scene and a truer one, choose the version that preserves historical pressure and emotional contradiction even if it leaves characters compromised, unsympathetic, or exposed.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If grief, desire, debt, illness, bodily damage, or shame are abstracted at the moment they should become sensory and social, rewrite toward the concrete consequence until the scene stops hiding from itself.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: moderate-high - contractions are the baseline for speech; uncontracted forms should appear only for emphasis, social performance, or character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate structural rhythms across the book: survival set-piece, aftermath inventory, intimate chamber scene, bureaucratic squeeze, outdoor search, quiet communal ritual, preparation without payoff, public reckoning, and departure elegy. Vary scene counts, dialogue density, and where the turn comes from so consecutive chapters never feel built from the same dramatic machine.
prose_style_profile.diction: Plainspoken and period-credible, with agricultural, domestic, and biblical undertones used sparingly; favor exact nouns and verbs over decorative frontier lyricism.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person rotating among Cora, Thea, Dell, August, and Hester, with only brief collective widening when weather or communal memory demands it
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Supple, pressure-sensitive prose: longer weather and labor sentences that can suddenly snap short at revelation, pain, or shame.
